'''patuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadblow|deadblow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadblow|deadblow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| patuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pætiyith|pætiyith]] || [[word:pætiyij|pætiyij]] || [[word:pætiyish|pætiyish]] || [[word:pætiyi|pætiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:patutuyuth|patutuyuth]] || [[word:patutuyuj|patutuyuj]] || [[word:patutuyush|patutuyush]] || [[word:patutuyu|patutuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:patuyuth|patuyuth]] || [[word:patuyuj|patuyuj]] || [[word:patuyush|patuyush]] || [[word:patuyu|patuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:patufyuth|patufyuth]] || [[word:patufyuj|patufyuj]] || [[word:patufyush|patufyush]] || [[word:patufyuf|patufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:patuyuthu|patuyuthu]] || [[word:patuyuju|patuyuju]] || [[word:patuyushu|patuyushu]] || [[word:patuyuku|patuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:patuyuth|patuyuth]] || [[word:patuyuj|patuyuj]] || [[word:patuyush|patuyush]] || [[word:patuyu|patuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:patuyuthul|patuyuthul]] || [[word:patuyujul|patuyujul]] || [[word:patuyushul|patuyushul]] || [[word:patuyukul|patuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:patuyuthuthu|patuyuthuthu]] || [[word:patuyujuju|patuyujuju]] || [[word:patuyushushu|patuyushushu]] || [[word:patuyuku|patuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:patuyuthun|patuyuthun]] || [[word:patuyujun|patuyujun]] || [[word:patuyushun|patuyushun]] || [[word:patuyukun|patuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:patuyuthuoro|patuyuthuoro]] || [[word:patuyujuoro|patuyujuoro]] || [[word:patuyushuoro|patuyushuoro]] || [[word:patuyukuoro|patuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
